responsibilities: Lead concept development and feasibility studies for new products from initial idea through proof-of-concept prototyping
Design and build functional prototypes using 3D CAD and rapid prototyping techniques to validate design concepts
Conduct engineering analysis and simulation to evaluate design alternatives against performance and cost targets
Develop and execute design verification and validation test plans to confirm products meet customer requirements
Collaborate with cross-functional teams including marketing, manufacturing, and quality to transition designs to production
Research emerging materials, technologies, and manufacturing methods to inform next-generation product innovation
Document design iterations, test results, and technical findings to support patent filings and intellectual property protection
Present design concepts and technical findings to stakeholders to secure project approval and funding for development phases
